summary: Live PR inventory shard reviewed in autonomous non-mutating mode. No shared canonical was selected; each seed PR is an independent open PR with maintainer review, author follow-up, draft status, failing checks, or technical correctness gates that make closure/merge/fix inappropriate for this job.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent maintainer-owned draft PR awaiting maintainer handling; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed or justified.
Keep open as an independent focused bug-fix PR with active author follow-up and unresolved needs-changes/CI review gates.
Keep open as an independent session-state PR awaiting maintainer review; green checks and technical correctness are explicit human gates in this job.
Keep open as an independent broad feature PR with active author follow-up and unresolved maintainer/technical review requirements.
Keep open as an independent maintainer-owned draft PR awaiting maintainer review; no closure gate is satisfied.
